title: ranunculus patens
intro: Ranunculus patens, also known as the spreading ranunculus or yellow river buttercup, is a perennial plant species belonging to the Ranunculaceae family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, which are attributed to the presence of alkaloids and glycosides. The health benefits of Ranunculus patens include its ability to reduce inflammation, treat skin conditions, and support immune function. The plant is often used in herbal preparations such as infusions, tinctures, and salves, which are used to treat a variety of ailments, including wounds, skin irritations, and respiratory issues.
